attributes.description: Company is in manufacturing and processing of various kinds of Edible, Non-Edible oils and meals. Company has manufacturing facility in Gandhidham, Gujarat, India.[1] Its edible oil portfolio includes includes brands like Vitalife, Mahek & Zaika. Vanaspati portfolio includes brands like Richfield & Puffpride. [2]
